commentaries.author: Douay Rheims 1609
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 1 Chronicles 22:12 Only the LORD give you wisdom and understanding, and give you charge concerning Israel, that you may keep the law of the LORD your God. Douay Rheims 1609 Yea and there came every day to David to help him, till it became a great number, as it were (a) the army of God. (a) An army of many good men, well disposed in order and concord, is called the army of God, like the great number of Angels, which to us are innumerable.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Understanding, (sensum.) Skill to resolve difficult questions. (Menochius)
That. Hebrew, "and appoint thee to rule. "(Haydock)

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
